channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Researchers claim their protocol can create truly random numbers on a current quantum computer
item.description: A team that included researchers at a US bank says it has created a protocol that can generate certified truly random numbers, opening the possibility that current generation quantum computers can be used for secure applications in finance, cryptography, cybersecurity, and privacy.
item.dc:creator: csoonline

item.title: Meet the DOGE team
item.description: Several members of Elon Musk’s Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) made their first public appearance as a team to make the case for their cost-cutting efforts amid growing pushback.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: ChatGPT's viral Studio Ghibli-style images highlight AI copyright concerns
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Fans of Studio Ghibli, the famed Japanese animation studio behind “Spirited Away” and other beloved movies, were delighted this week when a new version of ChatGPT let them transform popular internet memes or personal photos into the distinct style of Ghibli founder Hayao Miyazaki.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: What’s an email mask? Here’s why tech experts say you should be using one
item.description: You’ve heard of burner phones. What about burner email? So much of the internet now requires that you hand over your email address before you’re able to use any services—from an app you’ve downloaded to signing up for a newsletter or redeeming a special offer online.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: As big tech circles, UK government struggles to reap promised AI benefits
item.description: The UK government’s grand plan for AI in the public sector is struggling in the face of growing technological challenges, a report by the Parliamentary Public Accounts Committee (PAC), a bipartisan group of elected members of parliament, has found.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Los Angeles sheriff's department to retest 4,000 DNA samples after using faulty kits for 8 months
item.description: The Los Angeles County Sheriff’s Department says it will retest 4,000 DNA samples and open an internal investigation after learning that it used potentially flawed test kits for eight months.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: The Apple Watch faces a wearables wake-up call
item.description: Apple Watch sales are enduring a years-long backslide. While Apple first launched its watch in 2015, sales didn’t spike until the pandemic, when consumers were highly focused on their health.
item.dc:creator: Henry Chandonnet, Fast Company

item.title: Figure skating embraces the future with new technology, modern concepts to engage athletes and fans
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Ashley Wagner and Ben Agosto know what it's like to step off the ice at the figure skating world championships and feel as though they've conquered the sport. And what it feels like when the notoriously fickle sport bites back.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Intergalactic: The Heretic Prophet reportedly won't release until after 2026, as Neil Druckmann says that staff 'are playing it at the office' right now - but I don't think I can wait that long
item.description: Naughty Dog's next game, Intergalactic: The Heretic Prophet, reportedly won't launch until after 2026.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Nvidia GTC 2025: News and insights
item.description: Nvidia GTC 2025 has become a landmark event, solidifying the company’s position at the forefront of the AI technology. This year the major theme was agentic AI, which represents a shift from data generation to AI systems capable of autonomous reasoning and decision-making.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: 9 CRM trends for 2025: AI reshapes the customer equation
item.description: AI has the potential to transform every aspect of an enterprise, but nowhere more so than in customer relationship management (CRM), the outward-facing business functions of sales, marketing, and customer service.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: How RamaLama helps make AI model testing safer
item.description: Consider this example: An amazing new software tool emerges suddenly, turning technology industry expectations on their heads by delivering unprecedented performance at a fraction of the existing cost.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Judge allows newspaper copyright lawsuit against OpenAI to proceed
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A federal judge has ruled that The New York Times and other newspapers can proceed with a copyright lawsuit against OpenAI and Microsoft seeking to end the practice of using their stories to train artificial intelligence chatbots. U.S.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Teams successful on 52.2% of ball/strike challenges during spring training robot umpire test
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Teams won 52.2% of their ball/strike challenges during the spring training test of robot umpires, and catchers had a markedly better success rate than pitchers.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: U.S. blacklists these Chinese tech firms in latest update to export control list
item.description: China protested Wednesday after the U.S. added dozens of companies to its export control list, including more than 50 based in China that it says sought advanced knowhow in supercomputing, artificial intelligence and quantum technology for military purposes.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: The ‘living globe’ that can help drones fly without GPS
item.description: Before the advent of GPS, especially at sea, navigation meant finding your position by looking up at the stars.
item.dc:creator: Alex Pasternack, Fast Company

item.title: Signal Defends Security Amid Controversy Over Officials' Group Chat
item.description: Signal President Meredith Whittaker defends the security of the encrypted messaging app after a bombshell report reveals top Trump administration officials used it to discuss airstrike plans.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: GameStop adopts policy to buy Bitcoin, joining other firms
item.description: GameStop Corp., the struggling video-game retailer that became a favorite of retail traders during the meme stock frenzy in 2021, said its board has approved a plan to add Bitcoin as a treasury reserve asset.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: Databricks’ TAO method to allow LLM training with unlabeled data
item.description: Data lakehouse provider Databricks has unveiled a new large language model (LLM) training method, TAO that will allow enterprises to train models without labeling data.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: What you need to know about Go, Rust, and Zig
item.description: Every language has a life cycle. Sometimes it starts with a relatively narrow use case and escapes its container; sometimes it’s intended as a general-purpose language but finds a powerful niche instead.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Researchers in limbo as Columbia bows to Trump’s demands in bid to restore $400M federal funding
item.description: Researchers at Columbia University remain in limbo after the Ivy League institution bowed to the Trump administration’s demands for unprecedented changes in a bid to restore some $400 million in federal funds cut.
item.dc:creator: Philip Marcelo, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: GraalVM for JDK 24: A New Era in Java Development
item.description: Oracle releases GraalVM for JDK 24, an alternative Java Development Kit that uses machine learning-based profile inference to boost peak performance by about 7.9% on average on microservices benchmarks.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Warning for developers, web admins: update Next.js to prevent exploit
item.description: Developers and web admins using the Next.js framework for building or managing interactive web applications should install a security update to plug a critical vulnerability.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: 2025 global network outage report and internet health check
item.description: The reliability of services delivered by ISPs, cloud providers and conferencing services is critical for enterprise organizations.
item.dc:creator: Network World
